title: The Doom of Valyria: The City That Could Not Fall #got #shorts
description: Before Westeros, there was Valyria—a civilization that controlled dragons, fire, and blood magic itself. But power built on control always carries a cost. This is the story of the city that believed it could never fall. #Valyria #GameOfThrones #ASOIAF #Shorts

scenes.narration: Before Westeros had kings, there was Valyria—a city that ruled the world through fire and absolute power.
scenes.image_prompt: massive Valyria city with black stone towers, lava rivers flowing, dragons circling in a red sky, dark fantasy cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Valyria was not built by men alone—it was forged through magic, dragons, and the will to dominate everything.
scenes.image_prompt: dragonlords flying above Valyria, silver-haired rulers in dark armor, glowing runes, epic dark fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Its rulers were not kings but dragonlords, beings who bent fire itself into a weapon of conquest.
scenes.image_prompt: close view of a Valyrian dragonlord controlling a dragon with fire magic, intense expression, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Deep beneath the city, blood magic fueled their power, binding life and flame into something unnatural and dangerous.
scenes.image_prompt: underground ritual chamber with glowing symbols, chained figures, fire magic rituals, dark disturbing tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Fourteen volcanoes surrounded Valyria, held in place by spells, like chained gods waiting beneath the earth.
scenes.image_prompt: massive volcanoes encircling Valyria, glowing with controlled eruptions, ominous energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Valyrians believed they controlled these forces, that nothing in the world could ever threaten their empire.
scenes.image_prompt: Valyrian council hall with arrogant nobles, dragons roaring outside, golden firelight, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But magic is never owned—it weakens, shifts, and eventually breaks under the weight of those who misuse it.
scenes.image_prompt: cracks forming in lava and magical symbols fracturing beneath the city, unstable energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then the sky darkened, the ground split open, and the fires beneath Valyria began to rise uncontrollably.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple volcanoes erupting violently, sky turning black and red, dragons panicking, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In a single catastrophic moment, the flames they commanded turned against them and consumed everything.
scenes.image_prompt: Valyria collapsing, dragons falling, buildings melting in lava, chaos and destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The greatest empire in history vanished in a day—but something survived, carrying its fire into the future.
scenes.image_prompt: ruins of Valyria covered in ash and smoke, silent and haunting, faint dragon shadow in distance, vertical 1080x1920
